ui_label: Horizontal grid cell with a plane projection grid type.
description: Greenland ice sheet (GrIS) is modelled with 9.6 km square base cells that may subdivide to 1.2 km, and Antarctic ice sheet (AIS) with 8 km that may subdivide to 1 km. The meshes are updated every 8 timesteps for GrIS and 4 for AIS, allowing the resolution to evolve with the ice dynamics.
alias: BISICLES Ice Sheet adaptive computational mesh
